nasb.text: Now these are the foundations which Solomon laid for building the house of God. The length in cubits, according to the old standard was sixty cubits, and the width twenty cubits.

esv.text: These are Solomon’s measurements for building the house of God: the length, in cubits of the old standard, was sixty cubits, and the breadth twenty cubits.

cnv.text: 所羅門建造　神殿宇的根基是這樣：按古時的尺寸，長二十七公尺，寬九公尺。

ccb.text: 按照古时的尺度，他建造的上帝殿宇的地基长二十七米，宽九米。
